prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `1e81d6f9`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 task package for `1e81d6f9`. The rule is: the gray `5` corner in the upper-left marks the reference pixel at `(1,1)`, and every other occurrence of that pixel’s color is erased while everything else stays unchanged. The summary hint was used; it matched the official examples, so no `notes.md` was needed.

The verifier and generator are in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_1e81d6f9/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_1e81d6f9/verifier.py), and [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_1e81d6f9/generator.py). No new primitive was added. The generator keeps the official family’s fixed 15x15 layout, fixed 5-corner marker, keyed color at `(1,1)`, duplicate target-color singletons elsewhere, and sparse miscellaneous noise with occasional short accidental adjacencies.

Validation passed:
- `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 1e81d6f9` -> `4/4` official examples passed
- `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.build --task 1e81d6f9 --n-examples 1000` -> artifacts built
- `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 1e81d6f9` -> `1000/1000` generated examples passed

Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/1e81d6f9/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/1e81d6f9/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/1e81d6f9/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/1e81d6f9/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/1e81d6f9/previews/preview_03.png). I opened a generated preview and it looks visually consistent with the official task family.
